description: Face ID Customer Search V1: local OpenCV YuNet+SFace service, Postgres embeddings table, candidate review, no-match rescue

asi.hypothesis: Replace Compreface with local OpenCV face-service for faster, private face recognition with candidate review and no-match rescue

description: Attempted Docker-orchestrated integration test for API+face-service; abandoned because Jest process spawning is fragile and adds more flakiness than value
